Translate.cfg_enable_changer_desc: Enable syncing the raid environment time with the real world. When disabled, raid time progression will return to normal.
Translate.cfg_utc_offset_desc: Customize the UTC timezone offset for real-time synchronization (defaults to UTC+8).
Translate.cfg_daylight_saving_desc: Enable to adjust the synced time for Daylight Saving Time (adds an extra +1 hour to the UTC offset).
Translate.cfg_infinite_raid_desc: When enabled, pressing O in-raid replaces the countdown timer with a 24-hour real-world clock. Raid time limits will be removed, and the MIA status will be disabled.
Translate.cfg_show_real_time_desc: When enabled in non-immersive normal raids, pressing O will display both 'Raid Time | Real Time' on standard maps, or just 'Real Time' on Factory.
